source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the <image>, plant \( G_P(s) = \frac{2.2}{(1 + 0.1s)(1 + 0.4s)(1 + 1.2s)} \) and compensator \( G_C(s) = K \left[\frac{1 + T_1s}{1 + T_2s}\right] \). The external disturbance input is \( D(s) \). It is desired that when the disturbance is a unit step, the steady-state error should not exceed 0.1 unit. The minimum value of \( K \) is ________ (Round off to 2 decimal places).
